attributes.action: Stop Sir Keir Starmer committing the U.K. to closer ties in Europe.
attributes.additional_details: The Prime Minister is supposed to serve the people..not tell us what we are having because he says so. Brexit was voted for by the people. What gives him the right to over rule the people  . Brexit was watered down by the Conservatives and not a true reflection of what the people wanted. Make it work don't scrap it! Otherwise you mock British Democracy!
attributes.background: Brexit was voted for by the people and should not be reversed on the views of one man even if he is the P.M. Stop him committing us to closer ties without consulting the people..he is supposed to be serving!

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We're not sure exactly what specific policies you'd like the UK Government or Parliament to implement to prevent closer relations between the UK and Europe.

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what policies you would like the UK Government or Parliament to implement.
